title: campylospermum obtusifolium var. perseifolium
intro: Campylospermum obtusifolium var. perseifolium, a species of flowering plant, is a variant of the Campylospermum obtusifolium plant, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Campylospermum obtusifolium var. perseifolium include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and immune system support. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in water or using it as a tincture, which can be administered orally to leverage its medicinal properties.
